entities.name: AGROCLIMATOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the relationship between agriculture and climate.

entities.name: CROP PLANNING
entities.description: The process of deciding which crops to plant based on environmental factors.

entities.name: AGROCLIMATIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing agromet data to characterize a region's climate for agriculture.

entities.name: NALGONDA
entities.description: A target district for APRLP nucleus watersheds.

entities.name: MAHABUBNAGAR
entities.description: A target district for APRLP nucleus watersheds.

entities.name: KURNOOL
entities.description: A target district for APRLP nucleus watersheds.

entities.name: AGROMET DATA
entities.description: Meteorological data used for agricultural purposes.

entities.name: SOUTHWEST MONSOON SEASON
entities.description: The primary rainy season in the region.

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation received in the watersheds.

entities.name: NEMMIKAL
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with medium-deep Vertisols and Alfisols.

entities.name: APPAYAPALLY
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with medium-deep Alfisols.

entities.name: NANDAVARAM
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with deep Vertisols.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID CLIMATE
entities.description: A type of climate characterized by low rainfall, common to all locations.

entities.name: ARID CLIMATE
entities.description: A drier type of climate that some locations are shifting towards.

entities.name: MALLEBOINPALLY
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with a stable semi-arid climate and medium-deep Alfisols.

entities.name: DRY SUB-HUMID CLIMATE
entities.description: A climate type that Nemmikal was never categorized as.

entities.name: WATER BALANCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of water surplus and deficit in extreme rainfall years.

entities.name: WATER SURPLUS
entities.description: The amount of water exceeding the needs of the soil and crops.

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: The shortage of water relative to the needs of the soil and crops.

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of clay-rich soil found in Nemmikal and Nandavaram.

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil found in Appayapally, Thirumalapuram, Nemmikal, Kacharam, Mentapally, Sripuram, Malleboinpally, and Karivemula.

entities.name: DOUBLE CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two crops on the same land in one year.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously on the same field.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A medium-duration crop suitable for intercropping in Alfisols.

entities.name: CASTOR
entities.description: A medium-duration crop suitable for intercropping in Alfisols.

entities.name: KACHARAM
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with medium-deep Alfisols.

entities.name: MENTAPALLY
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with medium-deep Alfisols and water harvesting potential.

entities.name: SRIPURAM
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with medium-deep Alfisols.

entities.name: KARIVEMULA
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with medium-deep Alfisols and early season drought.

entities.name: SOLE CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing a single crop on a piece of land.

entities.name: SOIL WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available in the soil for crop use.

entities.name: EARLY SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought occurring at the beginning of the growing season, noted in Karivemula and Thirumalapuram.

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought occurring in the middle of the growing season, noted in Nandavaram.

entities.name: THIRUMALAPURAM
entities.description: A nucleus watershed location with medium-deep Alfisols and early season drought.

entities.name: WATER HARVESTING
entities.description: The collection and storage of rainwater for agricultural use.

entities.name: RAINFED CROP-GROWING SEASON
entities.description: The period during which crops can be grown using only rainfall.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop variety to withstand drought conditions.

relationships.description: provides opportunity for short duration crops
